name: infostyle
description: Edit Russian text using Ilyakhov's information style. Removes stop-words, cliches, bureaucratic language. Replaces with concrete facts and numbers. Adapts to context: UI, landing pages, emails, articles.
author: artgas1

skills.name: infostyle
skills.description: Edit and improve Russian text for clarity, specificity, and persuasion using Ilyakhov's information style methodology. Use when the user asks to edit, rewrite, improve, or review Russian text.
